G1.note: per-slot-pool variant reuse against the source atom bank (Phase-A anti-copy-paste check)

LYRIC_BESTSELLER_BEAT.top: here is the hinge: {{musician_name}} says worth was never earned, only covered over — {{theme}} un-covers, it doesn't add anything.

LYRIC_CLOSING.top: {{musician_name}} leaves the verdict unsigned — {{theme}} stays open for revision, the way it always was.

LYRIC_OPENING.top: the inner verdict reads itself out loud again — {{musician_name}} just names it: a voice, not a fact, sitting in {{topic_anchor}}.

MUSIC_REFLECTION_BESTSELLER_BEAT.top: bestseller beat: {{musician_name}} slows down exactly where the inner critic usually speeds up — that's the whole intervention.

MUSIC_REFLECTION_CLOSING.top: {{musician_name}} closes without asking {{theme}} to resolve — the verdict can stay unsigned, that is the practice, not the failure of it.

MUSIC_REFLECTION_OPENING.top: {{musician_name}} opens {{topic_anchor}} the observational way: notice the verdict arriving, then notice that it is only arriving, not arriving as truth.
